title: User-replaceable batteries are coming back in a big way
summary: The European Union has mandated user-replaceable batteries in portable tech devices, with regulations already in effect for smartphones and tablets and another taking force next year. The legislation aims to extend product longevity, improve repairability, and increase recyclability across consumer electronics.
content:
This is The Stepback, a weekly newsletter breaking down one essential story from the tech world. For more news about gadgets and smartphones, follow Dominic Preston. The Stepback arrives in our subscribers' inboxes at 8AM ET. Opt in for The Stepback here.
How it started
In 2023, the European Union agreed on two landmark pieces of legislation mandating how portable tech products with batteries must be designed, aiming to improve longevity, repairability, and recyclability. Commission Regulation (EU) 2023/1670 came into force last year and applies specifically to smartphones and tablets, while Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 takes effect next year …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 用户可更换电池重新大规模回归
zh.summary: 欧盟已强制要求便携式科技设备配备用户可更换电池，相关规定已对智能手机和平板电脑生效，另一项规定将在明年生效。该法规旨在延长产品寿命、改善可修复性并提高消费电子产品的可回收性。

title: On its 40th anniversary, we reassess 1986's SpaceCamp
summary: Ars Technica revisits the 1986 film SpaceCamp on its 40th anniversary, questioning whether it qualifies as a hidden gem, cult classic, or misguided production. The publication concludes it somehow embodies all three characteristics at once.
content: Is it a hidden gem, a cult classic, or hopelessly dumb? We vote "all of the above."

zh.title: 四十年后重新评价1986年的《太空营》
zh.summary: Ars Technica在1986年电影《太空营》四十周年纪念之际重新审视，质疑它是否是一部遗珠、小众经典还是方向错误的作品。该媒体认为它奇异地同时具备这三种特征。

title: The Mercedes CLA offers great EV specs for an average price
summary: Mercedes-Benz launches the CLA compact sedan for 2026-2027 model years, offering strong EV specifications and amenities at approximately $50,000, filling a gap in the affordable electric sedan segment. The vehicle features improved battery capacity, faster charging, and refined interior design alongside engaging driving dynamics.
content:
Despite headwinds from the current administration, automakers continue to release well-equipped EVs with bigger battery packs and increasingly faster charging speeds. For those who want to travel further between plugging in, the future is still bright, just slightly tinted.
But there haven't been many sedans starting around or below $50,000, as crossover SUVs have largely taken up this territory. Now, Mercedes-Benz has released its CLA compact sedan which ticks every box above for the 2026 and 2027 model year, and throws in pleasant interior amenities and fun driving character for good measure.

Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 梅赛德斯-奔驰CLA以亲民价格提供卓越的电动车性能
zh.summary: 梅赛德斯-奔驰为2026-2027年推出CLA紧凑型轿车，以约50,000美元的价格提供强劲的电动车性能和配置，填补经济型电动轿车细分市场的空白。该车型具有改进的电池容量、更快的充电速度和精致的内部设计，同时提供出色的驾驶体验。

title: They call it stupid hot for a reason: Heat muddles animal brains
summary: Rising temperatures are affecting animal cognition and behavior, with extreme heat causing some species to become more aggressive while others struggle with learning and memory. The phenomenon highlights how climate change impacts wildlife beyond habitat loss through direct neurological effects.
content: As temperatures rise, some creatures pick fights while others struggle to learn.

zh.title: 他们称之为"热得离谱"是有原因的：炎热扰乱动物大脑
zh.summary: 气温上升正在影响动物的认知和行为，极端高温导致某些物种变得更具攻击性，而其他物种则在学习和记忆方面陷入困境。这一现象表明气候变化除了造成栖息地丧失外，还通过直接的神经生物学效应对野生动物产生影响。
